description: Critical-path golden fixtures for TVT (MEMA-24). JSON stays in-repo; large *.mkv files are gitignored and optional for CI.

paths.role: Segment expectations for synthetic multi-file scenarios (detection / similarity).

in_repo_checks: Every segments.json under the roots above must be valid JSON with test_name, files, and expected_segments.
Fast CI: parse + schema validation only. Full tier: tests marked #[ignore] that need local .mkv files.
MEMA-15: every tests/samples/**/segments.json must fall under a manifest root; see tests/sample_fixture_coverage.rs.
